name: roots-and-roads-webpage
description: Roots & Roads website and its two Google Apps Script projects (clasp-managed).

scripts.deploy:booking: cd apps-script/booking && clasp push -f && clasp deploy -i PASTE_BOOKING_DEPLOYMENT_ID_HERE -d "Deployed via npm run deploy:booking"
scripts.deploy:control: cd apps-script/control && clasp push -f && clasp deploy -i PASTE_CONTROL_DEPLOYMENT_ID_HERE -d "Deployed via npm run deploy:control"
